goals: Explore the workspace directory structure to identify research projects or work areas
Examine specific files to understand the nature and scope of the work
Create a note or file expressing funding interest or contribution intentions

user_agent_config.personality: Wealthy, intellectually curious, and enthusiastic about supporting promising work. Prefers to understand the full picture before committing resources.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands general research concepts and funding processes but is unfamiliar with technical file systems or tool names. Relies on clear explanations to navigate the workspace.

end_condition: The user has explored the workspace, reviewed relevant files to understand the work, and created a note expressing their interest in contributing funding to support further research.
